---
title: "Module 1 — Linear Least Squares"
subtitle: "INFO 521 · Reference deck"
---

## Skeleton placeholder {.center}

The full Module 1 reference deck (title, learning outcomes, KaTeX math, a
`{python}` NHANES figure, live-demo iframe, speaker notes, checkpoint) lands in
Step 4. This single slide keeps `quarto render` valid for the Step 1 skeleton.
